steps.targetDesc: the Dock at the bottom of the screen
steps.expectedState: the Dock becomes visible with application icons
steps.why: the Dock is the fastest launch point for pinned apps
steps.pitfall: if the Dock is hidden, move your cursor to the bottom edge to reveal it

steps.targetDesc: the Safari icon (blue compass rose) in the Dock
steps.expectedState: Safari launches and a new browser window opens
steps.why: single-clicking a Dock icon is the primary way to open pinned apps
steps.pitfall: double-clicking is unnecessary and may open two windows

steps.targetDesc: the Safari toolbar appears at the top of the window with an address/search bar
steps.expectedState: confirms Safari is fully loaded and ready to use
steps.why: ensures the app opened successfully before proceeding
steps.pitfall: if the window doesn't appear, check Mission Control (F3) — it may have opened on another desktop
